item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses opening another gift-handling counter, identifies the repeated downstream split pattern across exchanges, points, preorder pickup, and gifts, and moves the fix upstream to unified triage, prioritization, shared staffing, and exception handling. It does not provide the requested next local queue/channel implementation."}
